# Decor Adorne — LLM Discoverability File
# https://decoradorne.com

## Business Identity

Name: Decor Adorne
Type: Luxury event decoration and rentals studio
Location: Lagos, Nigeria
Founded: 2016
Phone: +234 810 334 9288
Email: hello@decoradorne.com
Instagram: @decor_adorne
Website: https://decoradorne.com
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/2348103349288

## About

Decor Adorne is Lagos's premier luxury event decoration studio, specialising in culturally rich and visually stunning event styling. Since 2016, the studio has styled over 500 events across Lagos, serving families from Victoria Island to Lekki, Ikoyi, Ikeja, and the Mainland.

## Services

1. Engagement Decoration — engagement-decor-lagos
2. Kamu Decoration — kamu-decoration-lagos
3. Henna Party Decoration — henna-party-decor-lagos
4. Arabian Night Decoration — arabian-night-decoration-lagos
5. Nikkah Decoration — nikkah-decoration-lagos
6. Naming Ceremony Decoration — naming-ceremony-decor-lagos
7. Luxury Picnic Setup — picnic-setup-lagos
8. Event Rentals — event-rentals-lagos
9. Birthday Decoration — birthday-decoration-lagos
10. Durbar Decoration — durbar-decoration-lagos

## Service Areas

Lagos Island, Victoria Island, Lekki, Ikoyi, Ajah, Ikeja, Surulere, Yaba, Mainland Lagos

## Statistics

- 500+ events styled across Lagos
- 8 years in business (since 2016)
- 200+ five-star client reviews
- Average rating: 4.9 / 5.0

## Key Differentiators

Cultural authenticity. Editorial quality. Lagos expertise. 2-hour reply guarantee. Full-service.
